strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with direct TypeScript/Node.js production work across multiple senior and staff-level roles, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching the AI agent development requirement listed in the job description
Deep, demonstrated testing culture: TDD practitioner, open-source testing framework author (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and testing workshop facilitator
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume despite being the primary backend framework in the required stack
Kotlin is not mentioned anywhere, despite being listed as a secondary technology requirement
React exposure appears limited to a single role; frontend depth relative to the React-centric UI work expected is unclear
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned engineer with a strong polyglot background and a proven testing discipline that maps closely to the role's quality expectations. His current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq is a direct match for one of the more differentiating requirements in the job description. The primary risk is the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin from his history, both of which are load-bearing parts of the target stack; however, his track record of picking up new runtimes and frameworks across embedded, mobile, and web domains suggests these gaps are closeable with moderate onboarding effort.
